summary: Complete testing of Quick Import feature and auto-refresh data. All 12 requested features verified working. Backend: 9/9 tests passed. Frontend: All Quick Import flows working correctly.
passed_tests: Login: username 'testpilot' password 'password123' - login and redirect to dashboard PASSED
Fleet page: navigate to My Fleet, fleet stats show (Total Ships, Cargo, Crew, Value in aUEC) PASSED
Quick Import: click 'Quick Import' button, modal opens with ship grid, search, manufacturer filter, size filter PASSED
Quick Import: search for 'Carrack', shows 24 matching ships including multiple Carrack variants PASSED
Quick Import: select ship by clicking, checkmark appears and count updates to '1 selected' PASSED
Quick Import: select multiple ships, Import button shows count, clicking imports them PASSED
Quick Import: ships already in fleet show 'IN FLEET' badge and can't be selected (grayed out) PASSED
Quick Import: 'Select all visible' link works - selected 251 ships (excluding 20 already in fleet) PASSED
Quick Import: filter by manufacturer (Drake Interplanetary) - shows 28 Drake ships PASSED
Quick Import: filter by size (Large) - shows 40 Large ships PASSED
Fleet persistence: ships added via Quick Import persist across page navigation PASSED
Fleet remove: Remove button removes ship from fleet, toast shows 'Removed from your fleet' PASSED
Backend: POST /api/fleet/bulk-add with array of ships works correctly, returns added/skipped counts PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: Quick Import modal correctly implements searchable ship grid with data-testid selectors
Manufacturer filter and Size filter work correctly with dropdown selects
Bulk-add endpoint correctly skips duplicates and returns added/skipped counts
CACHE_TTL=3600 in live_api.py enables hourly auto-refresh of ship data
seed_data_creation: Backend tests create test user with unique UUID prefix, cleanup handled via fixture
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quick Import feature fully implemented with QuickImportModal component in Fleet.jsx. POST /api/fleet/bulk-add accepts {ships: [{id, name, manufacturer}]} and returns {success, added, skipped, message}. CACHE_TTL=3600 in live_api.py auto-refreshes data hourly. All data-testid selectors working: quick-import-btn, quick-import-modal, import-search, import-mfg-filter, import-size-filter, select-all-btn, import-ship-{id}, confirm-import-btn.

feature_verification_summary.fleet_stats_display: PASS - Total Ships, Cargo (SCU), Max Crew, Fleet Value (aUEC) shown
feature_verification_summary.quick_import_modal: PASS - Opens with ship grid, search, filters
feature_verification_summary.search_functionality: PASS - Search for 'Carrack' returns 24 matching ships
feature_verification_summary.ship_selection_checkmark: PASS - Clicking ship shows checkmark and updates count
feature_verification_summary.multi_select_import: PASS - Selected ships imported, toast shows 'X ships added, Y already in fleet'
feature_verification_summary.in_fleet_badge: PASS - Ships in fleet show 'IN FLEET' badge and are disabled
feature_verification_summary.select_all_visible: PASS - Selects all non-fleet ships (251 out of 271)
feature_verification_summary.manufacturer_filter: PASS - Drake Interplanetary filter shows 28 ships
feature_verification_summary.fleet_persistence: PASS - Ships persist after navigation away and back
feature_verification_summary.fleet_remove: PASS - Remove button works, toast confirms removal

auto_refresh_verification.refresh_behavior: Data auto-refreshes hourly instead of only on server restart
